message:
refactor(text): export and centralize grapheme_width function

Export grapheme_width from ftui-text crate's public API and refactor
internal code to use this centralized function instead of calling
UnicodeWidthStr::width() directly on grapheme strings.

Changes:
- lib.rs: Add grapheme_width to pub use from wrap module
- wrap.rs: Replace .width() trait method calls with grapheme_width()
- segment.rs: Import grapheme_width, remove unicode_width import
- text.rs: Import grapheme_width, remove unicode_width import

This provides a single source of truth for grapheme width calculation
and enables downstream crates to use the same function rather than
depending directly on unicode_width.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
